titleThai: I Want to End This Love Game
altTitle: I Want to End the "I Love You" Game / I Want to End the Game That I Love / I Want to End the Game of Love.
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
For four years, childhood friends Yukiya Asagi and Miku Sakura have been playing something they call the "love game." The rules are simple: they declare love to one another, and the first one to blush loses. Yukiya is set on winning against Miku, going as far as to read her favorite manga and change his appearance, but no matter what he does, Miku always seems to be one step ahead.

Now in high school, Yukiya and Miku have slightly changed the rules of the game. They can do just about anything to fluster the other party and force them to admit defeat—but it usually ends in a tie. Their true feelings could not be more apparent—yet the stubborn pair refuses to stop the game, even if they can barely control their growing affection.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titleThai: Agents of the Four Seasons: Dance of Spring
altTitle: Agents of the Four Seasons / 春夏秋冬代行者 春の舞
channel: Muse Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
For centuries, the task of bringing the seasons has been carried out by the Agents of the Four Seasons, individuals whose god-like powers make them an easy target for covetous groups. One such group, the Rebels, orchestrates an attack on the Agents. To save the others, the Agent of Spring, Hinagiku Kayou, allows herself to be captured and disappears from the face of the Earth. Despite the lack of help, even from her own village, Hinagiku's guard, Sakura Himedaka, believes she is still alive somewhere and refuses to give up the search.

Against all odds, Hinagiku is found 10 years later. However, the traumatic event caused a massive shift in her personality. Thanks to Sakura's encouragement, Hinagiku gets the courage to summon the season that was once lost. In order to move forward, the duo must face a past that haunts them and demons willing to destroy everything to achieve their goals.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

altTitle: Kanan-sama Is Easy as Hell! / カナン様はあくまでチョロい
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
Kanan is a demon who descends upon the human world with one goal: to feast on the sweetest delicacy of all—young human souls. Disguised as a high schooler, she sets her sights on her first target, an unassuming boy named Youji Kyougi. But just as she prepares to claim her meal, things take a very unexpected turn.

Instead of devouring him, Kanan ends up forming a "romantic contract" with Youji. For someone who's lived for millennia without experiencing love, navigating high school romance proves more terrifying than any hunt. Between awkward dates, hand-holding mishaps, and feelings she can't quite name, the once-proud demon finds herself flustered at every turn.

A supernatural romcom about a lovestruck demon and the boy who was supposed to be her prey—sweet, chaotic, and full of firsts.

(Source: MAL News)

altTitle: TBATE / 最強の王様、二度目の人生は何をする? Season2
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
After being granted a second life, now-teenage Arthur Leywin—an unparalleled, ruthless king in his previous life—has finally become an adventurer with the help of his mentor, Jasmine Flamesworth. Although he is still far from his ultimate goal of becoming more powerful than in his past life, Arthur demonstrates remarkable skill in adventuring, exceeding everyone's expectations.

Meanwhile, Arthur's elven friend and Elenoir Kingdom's princess, Tessia Eralith, has also started adventuring. Due to the prolonged hostility between humans and elves, her duty is to spread goodwill and create friendly relations with human kingdoms. However, as a mysterious group threatens to harm the races' fragile relationship, both Arthur and Tessia soon find themselves becoming pivotal parts of a larger change for the better.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

altTitle: LIAR GAME
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Nao Kanzaki is honest to a fault. Uncorrupted and virtuous, Nao is the perfect target for a large-scale scheme—the so-called Liar Game. Suddenly in possession of one hundred million yen, she is expected to steal the same amount from her assigned opponent—her former middle school teacher—or face crushing debt. Trusting her teacher without question, Nao quickly realizes that she is trapped.

To gain an advantage, Nao comes in contact with Shinichi Akiyama, a brilliant con artist just released from prison. Though Akiyama has no real reason to help the naive girl, he ends up aiding her victory. However, driven by her unwavering sense of justice, Nao chooses to continue into the next round, and Akiyama, unwilling to leave her to fail, joins her. In the Liar Game, participants are expected and required to deceive, manipulate, and betray or be buried in lifelong debt. Yet Nao, with the help of Akiyama's genius, is determined to beat the game without abandoning her morals and prove that generosity and sincerity will always prevail.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
note: นำเข้าจาก Jikan spring 2026; ยังไม่ได้ยืนยันช่องทางรับชมซับไทยบน YouTube

altTitle: キルアオ
channel: It's Anime powered by REMOW
platform: YouTube
summary:
Rumors say that Juuzou Oogami, a middle-aged, professional hitman, will assassinate anyone for an adequate reward. The hearsay could not be further away from the truth, though, as he has a personal rule to only kill those who are truly evil and irredeemable. But due to starting his killing career early, Oogami never experienced a normal childhood, and he regrets some of the choices he has made over the years.

However, Oogami's life takes a drastic turn when—after another seemingly regular job—a mysterious wasp stings him with venom which reverts his body to the form of a teenager! Although taken aback, Oogami soon receives a mission that is perfect for his new body: he needs to blend into and investigate a private middle school, where his boss is enrolling his daughter next year.

Despite failing to leave a good first impression on his classmates, Oogami quickly falls in love with schoolwork. Moreover, he discovers that his classmate Noren Mitsuoka has connections to the company that created the very same wasp that stung him. As he befriends Noren and other students, Oogami sets out to enjoy the little things about being a teenager while searching for a way to restore his body.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

altTitle: あかね噺
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
From a young age, Akane Ousaki has always loved to watch her father, Tooru, practice and perform rakugo, a form of traditional Japanese comedic storytelling. Rakugo performers are split into three ranks, with the highest, shinuchi, only granted to the very best performers after they pass a difficult promotion test. When Tooru takes the exam, Akane experiences her father putting on a stellar performance in front of a big crowd and judges, but the strict main judge, Isshou Arakawa, still fails him, forcing him to quit rakugo.

Ever since, Akane has been diligently practicing rakugo herself. Now a senior in high school, she coincidentally lands a spot to perform in front of a crowd with the help of Shiguma Arakawa, Tooru's former teacher. Her splendid performance surprises everyone and is just the beginning: Shiguma appoints her as his new apprentice, and with his help, Akane sets out to become a shinuchi in her father's place.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

The moment the gloomy Okuto Nakamura first laid eyes on Aiki Hirose during the school entrance ceremony it was love at first sight. Ever since then, Nakamura has dreamt of becoming Hirose's best friend. However, every attempt he makes to talk to his popular classmate ends in utter disaster for him. 

Much to Nakamura's surprise, he does eventually make an impression on Hirose, albeit not quite the one he wanted. Unfortunately for Nakamura, however, it seems that the biggest obstacle in his way is his own delusions!

Cecil Glo Alphasta's life is always utterly unchallenging. The heir to his father's kingdom, he is known as a genius in everything he accomplishes. However, nothing interests him until he meets his fiancée, Bertia Ibil Noches.

On their first meeting, Bertia tells him they are inside an otome game, and she has the role of the villainess who interferes with the relationship between Cecil and the heroine. Although she proclaims she will fulfill her duty as a "wicked flower," Bertia's actions end up causing more good than harm. Intrigued by her behavior and deeds, Cecil decides he wants Bertia around and helps her behind the scenes. But with a fiancée like Bertia, the heroine might not be needed anymore.

titleThai: The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)!

platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
After suddenly being transported to another world, high school student Hibiki Manabe finds himself forced to survive in unfamiliar surroundings with the rare support-oriented job class Appraiser. Though not suited for direct combat, the class allows him to perceive information others cannot, even if its true value may not be immediately apparent.

Initially lost, Hibiki meets Emalia Steinbart, an elf who helps him take his first steps as an adventurer. However, after spending several days traveling together, she parts ways with him to answer an urgent summons from her homeland. Left on his own, Hibiki continues learning how to make use of his abilities as he encounters new companions along the way.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

altTitle: Reincarnation no Hanabira / リィンカーネーションの花弁
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
There exists an object known as the "Branch of Reincarnation" that can grant people the talents of the past lives, so long as they slit their own throat with it.

Touya Senji is a teenage boy struggling with low self-esteem after growing up in the shadow of his gifted older brother. He comes to the decision that academic studies are his last resort in the search for talent, but fails to find satisfaction despite constantly placing in the top 100 for national mock exams.

In a twist of fate, Touya encounters one of his classmates, Haito Luo Buffett, a "Returner" who has resurrected the talents of her past life using the Branch of Reincarnation, as she fights against a serial killer.

(Source: Press Release)

titleThai: Botan Kamiina Fully Blossoms When Drunk
titleOriginal: Kamiina Botan, Yoeru Sugata wa Yuri no Hana
altTitle: Kamiina Botan / the Drunken Appearance Is a Lily Flower / 上伊那ぼたん、酔へる姿は百合の花
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
For Ibuki Tonami, drinking alcohol is her favorite way to unwind from her college studies and duties as her dormitory's resident assistant. However, due to past bad experiences with others, Ibuki feels insecure about the hiccups she gets when drinking and therefore only drinks alone. But as first-year student Botan Kamiina moves into the same dormitory, things begin to change.

During an outing with their dormmates, Botan coincidentally spots Ibuki drinking by herself. Although she has never tried alcohol before, Botan is curious about Ibuki and her drink. Ibuki willingly shares her drink, and it turns out that drinking alcohol turns the usually well-mannered, cheerful Botan into an assertive flirt.

The other residents of their dormitory are shocked to discover that the withdrawn Ibuki has started drinking with Botan. Every new drink Botan tries becomes a fond memory, and she hopes to gradually break Ibuki out of her shell so that the two can enjoy drinks with the others one day.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titleOriginal: Nigashita Sakana wa Ookikatta ga Tsuriageta Sakana ga Ookisugita Ken
altTitle: The Fish I Missed Was Big / But I Caught Another Fish Was Too Big. / Nigetsuri
channel: Muse Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
Due to her incredible athletic skills, Maria "Mimi" Annovazzi has been trained her entire life to inherit her family's duchy. However, the birth of her younger brother makes this unnecessary. No longer the heir, Mimi has to settle down as soon as possible, but none of the kingdom's good marriage prospects remain. She decides to travel to a neighboring country and transfer to the royal academy in hopes of finding a husband. Aida Amethis, a distant relative and Mimi's best friend, agrees to help her.

Her trip turns chaotic when the future crown prince and Aida's fiancé, Renato di Rubini, mistakes Mimi for Aida and annuls his non-existent engagement to her. He planned to free Aida from the arranged betrothal so she could be with the man she actually loves instead. Although the misunderstanding is cleared, Mimi worries about her reputation after the scandal, so she asks Renato to help her find a suitor. Unbeknownst to her, Mimi's sunny attitude and fighting prowess capture the attention of the biggest catch in the whole kingdom: Renato himself!

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
note: นำเข้าจาก Jikan spring 2026; ยังไม่ได้ยืนยันช่องทางรับชมซับไทยบน YouTube

altTitle: 夜桜さんちの大作戦 第2期
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Taiyou Asano has settled into his career, having married into the Yozakura spy family. While he still struggles to control the powers granted to him by his wife, Mutsumi Yozakura, Taiyou works hard to complete missions alongside his new siblings. After taking down the organization Tanpopo, Taiyou and the Yozakuras agree to look after six-year-old Ai, one of Tanpopo's test subjects.

However, Taiyou's health soon begins to decline due to the Yozakura blood within his body. He dreams that the first head of the family, Tsubomi Yozakura, gives him a new mission: to kill her. To that end, he will have to learn more about his new family, become a silver-ranked spy, and push himself even more to succeed and continue protecting his family.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
When the new term starts, second-year student Abikura discovers that his homeroom teacher is none other than Hiyori Hiwamura, infamously known as "Scary-Scary Sensei," a woman rumored to curse anyone who crosses her.

But one day, Abikura accidentally witnesses a completely unexpected side of his fearsome teacher after school. The striking contrast between her fearsome image and her hidden personality is utterly irresistible!

Brace yourself for Gap Moe overload in this tender romantic comedy that's sure to ignite your protective instincts!

(Source: MAL News)

titleOriginal: Haibara-kun no Tsuyokute Seishun New Game
altTitle: 灰原くんの強くて青春ニューゲーム
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Although college student Natsuki Haibara has already secured a stable future for himself, he frequently thinks back to his high school days. At the time, he was socially anxious and overweight, and his attempts at becoming outgoing fell completely flat. One evening, Natsuki prays to be able to redo his teenage years and finds out the next morning that he has traveled back in time before his high school debut!

Having one month before the entrance ceremony, Natsuki immediately uses this chance to get himself into shape. When the first day of high school finally arrives, he makes a good first impression and befriends familiar faces, including Hikari Hoshimiya, his high school crush. Natsuki quickly realizes that his feelings for Hoshimiya have not changed and makes going out with her his new goal.

While enjoying time with Hoshimiya and his other friends, Natsuki rekindles his love for basketball and even secures a part-time job at a local cafe. But with new friends come unfamiliar challenges, and Natsuki must overcome them if he wants to enjoy his adolescence to the fullest.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titleThai: The Classroom of a Black Cat and a Witch
altTitle: 黒猫と魔女の教室
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
The Royal Diana Academy is a prestigious school that accepts individuals with adept magical abilities. Upon graduation, these students find themselves at the top of their field or employed by the royal family. Spica Virgo dreams of studying at the academy, aiming to be a top-rate sorceress like her idol Claude Sirius. Claude is a world-renowned sorcerer who became the institution's youngest instructor, but mysteriously disappeared soon after.

Lacking the experience and connections required for admission, Spica finds herself unable to make meaningful progress with her training. One day, however, she meets a talking black cat with magical abilities. Hoping to change the situation for the better, she begs the animal to take her as his apprentice and teach her the magic she needs to attend the academy. The cat accepts the deal on one condition—she must find a way to reverse his feline curse. Despite the arduous challenges ahead of her, Spica is determined to prove herself as a student worthy of the cat's mentorship.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
note: นำเข้าจาก Jikan spring 2026; ยังไม่ได้ยืนยันช่องทางรับชมซับไทยบน YouTube

altTitle: マオ / MAO
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
Nanoka passes through a portal into the Taisho era, where exorcist Mao reluctantly rescues her from the jaws of a grotesque yokai. When Nanoka gets back to the present, she discovers she has some new, incredible abilities. She returns to the past looking for answers, only to get caught up in Mao's investigation of a series of gruesome murders. As her questions about herself multiply, Nanoka learns that Mao is cursed by a cat demon named Byoki—and so is his sword. If anyone but Mao attempts to wield it, they are doomed. But when Mao's life is in jeopardy, Nanoka picks up his blade and swings!

(Source: VIZ Media)

altTitle: 神の庭付き楠木邸
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
Since childhood, Minato Kusunoki could see supernatural beings, especially friendly ones. Soon after his mother leaves him in charge of a vacant house in the countryside, he draws the attention of a wolf-like mountain god named Yamagami, who is intrigued by the unusual purity surrounding the residence. Through Yamagami's guidance, Minato discovers the source of this mystery: anything written by his hand—regardless of the surface or the words themselves—carries the power to exorcise evil spirits.

As more visitors arrive, Minato becomes the caretaker of an abode that now stands at the boundary between the human and divine worlds. At the same time, though still unfamiliar with the full extent of his powers, he begins to realize that they may have uses beyond simply keeping the area free of malice.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titleOriginal: Megami "Isekai Tensei Nani ni Naritai desu ka" Ore "Yuusha no Rokkotsu de"
altTitle: Ribsekai / Goddess: "What Do You Want to Turn Into When You're Reincarnated in Another World?" Me: "Into a Hero's Rib" / 女神「異世界転生何になりたいですか」俺「勇者の肋骨で」
channel: Tropics Anime Asia
platform: YouTube
summary:
The protagonist of the tale, simply referred to as "I," experiences an endless cycle of reincarnation. The narrative takes place in a different universe where people are free to select their next form. However, the waiting list for popular roles, like "Demon King" or "Hero with Cheat Skills and a Harem," has reached 50,000 years due to a recent spike in applications.

The protagonist decides to repeatedly reincarnate into increasingly strange forms because he refuses to wait. These roles include the rib of a hero in charge of a harem, a hermit crab, a vegetable, and even an explosive used to blow up blissfully happy couples.

(Source: MAL News)
note: นำเข้าจาก Jikan spring 2026; ยังไม่ได้ยืนยันช่องทางรับชมซับไทยบน YouTube

titleOriginal: Jidou Hanbaiki ni Umarekawatta Ore wa Meikyuu wo Samayou 3rd Season
altTitle: I Was Reborn as a Vending Machine / Wandering in the Dungeon / I Reincarnated Into a Vending Machine
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
An entire year has passed since Boxxo arrived at the village of Clearflow Lake. Alongside Lammis and his other friends, Boxxo has been able to create a steady customer base and even halt the Netherlord's evil plans to invade the different strata within the dungeon. However, some of the former members of Menagerie of Fools, who have joined the Netherlord's side, are still at large. Determined to protect everyone's safety and maintain the status quo of Clearflow Lake, Boxxo sets out to find the fugitives and put an end to the Netherlord's oppression—using the various vending machine forms at his disposal.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titleOriginal: Mata Korosarete Shimatta no desu ne, Tantei-sama
altTitle: Matakoro / また殺されてしまったのですね、探偵様
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Sakuya Otsuki is the son of a legendary detective, working to follow in his father's footsteps with his assistant, Lilithea. However, something's different about this high-school sleuth. Wherever he goes, he always manages to get himself entangled in his cases—as a murder victim! When Sakuya is tasked to infiltrate a luxury cruise ship, he finds himself killed once again. But every time he reopens his eyes, Lilithea is there by his side, ready to help him get to the bottom of the mystery...

(Source: Yen Press)

titleThai: Even a Replica Can Fall in Love
altTitle: Even a Replica Falls in Love / レプリカだって、恋をする。
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
On days when Sunao is sick, or not feeling like going to school, she is called to take her place. She was born to this world when Sunao wished to have a substitute. No one knows that she exists, but she tries to do her best for Sunao whenever she is called. One day she talks with Sanada, one of her classmates. They become friends, but soon he notices that she is different from the original Sunao...he was the first one who did. She tells him to talk with her only when she has her hair half-up. Sanada does like she told him, and they enjoy their time together. As they become closer, she realizes that she has special feelings toward Sanada. But she doesn't know what will happen to her...if she, a replica, falls in love.

(Source: Kadokawa)
note: นำเข้าจาก Jikan spring 2026; ยังไม่ได้ยืนยันช่องทางรับชมซับไทยบน YouTube

altTitle: スノウボールアース
channel: Muse Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
Yukio was destroyed in battle and Tetsuo survived in an escape pod. After eight years in cold sleep, the escape pod finally lands back on Earth. But when Tetsuo emerges he finds a world in ruins, entirely frozen beneath a blanket of ice and snow—snowball Earth! What happened to humanity, how did the planet freeze over, and will Tetsuo be able to keep his last promise to Yukio?

(Source: VIZ Media)

altTitle: 茉莉花ちゃんの好感度はぶっ壊れている
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Confessing to my childhood friend Marika was impossible for someone as unpopular as me. So, I did what any desperate boy would do—I wished upon a shooting star! When I woke up, that dream had come true?! I could see a love meter for people, just like in a love simulation game. Once I realized this was real and not a dream I went straight to see Marika. Her love meter was so low it had broken and practically fallen all the way to hell! If she hated me so much why was she so nice?! Is this how she really felt or...?!

(Source: Coolmic)

altTitle: ただいま、おじゃまされます！
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
So is this what it means to have roommates now?! Office worker Rinko, 24, lives alone and is secretly an otaku. One day, her apartment gets connected to the two neighboring rooms through a "hole" in the wall.

In the room on the left is a fresh-faced yet mysterious guy who is overly-sweet to Rinko.

The room on the right is occupied by a guy with violent tendencies who is similarly mysterious... But wait! "I... I think I know him!" Rinko's only source of solitude, her apartment, has been turned upside down. Now, every day is full of heart-pounding surprises!

(Source: MangaPlaza)

platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
What's a maid to do when she finds herself suddenly stuck in Japan for a year? Eat, of course! Follow maid-in-training Suzume Tachibana as she tries all sorts of Japanese food, from sweets like taiyaki and melon bread to savory snacks like takoyaki and onigiri! Be warned, though—while Suzume sates her appetite through delicious treat after delicious treat, she might just end up whetting yours!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

summary:
The story follows Koichi Asakura, a designer for an ad agency who works hard but receives no recognition. After being dropped from a project, he visits a place from his past, where he met Eren Yamagishi. Eren, meanwhile, is recognized as a genius left-handed graffiti artist in New York, while enduring the struggles that come from her own path in life.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

altTitle: Awashima Hyakkei / One Hundred Views of Awajima / Scenes from Awajima
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
This omnibus adolescent drama is about a group of young girls who all attend a "girls-only musical school," recounting the formative years they shared, at times shifting between different characters' viewpoints and time.

Awajima Musical School Training Camp, dubbed the "boarding house," is where young girls gather from all over Japan to perform on stage. Tabata Wakana aspires to be a musical star; housemaster Takehara Kinue attends to carry on her best friend's wishes; beautiful Okabe Emi is a scholarship student who is always at the center of attention; and Ibuki Katsurako, who became a teacher at the school though originally from a family of actresses.

The unique environment of the musical school is simultaneously a respite space for these aspiring girls and also a harsh battleground that pits young students against each other. It is a place where perseverance can lead to blossoming talents, but also to a cruel reality at times. The clear depiction and psychological portrayal allow the subtle inner workings of each character to come through.

(Source: Japan Media Arts Festival, edited)
note: นำเข้าจาก Jikan spring 2026; ยังไม่ได้ยืนยันช่องทางรับชมซับไทยบน YouTube

titleOriginal: Mamonogurai no Boukensha: Ore dake Mamono wo Kuratte Tsuyoku Naru
altTitle: 魔物喰らいの冒険者 ~俺だけ魔物を喰らって強くなる~
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
Nobody wants "Grubby Forager" Rudd on their adventuring team. His nickname—and his stench—come from his constant treks into the Noxious Labyrinth to gather medicinal herbs, a job he survives only thanks to his status immunity skill. When he's finally recruited as a party porter, things seem to be looking up... Until a deadly dungeon monster appears and his fake allies use him as bait before abandoning him! Wounded, destitute, and barely surviving the attack, Rudd breaks a forbidden taboo to stay alive: eating monsters. But the more he devours, the more power he gains, kicking off a thrilling, adventurous gourmet fantasy!

(Source: Square Enix)

altTitle: 一畳間まんきつ暮らし！
channel: It's Anime powered by REMOW
platform: YouTube
summary:
Hailing from a rural town, Meiko Morita moves to the bright city of Tokyo to enroll in the prestigious Amamiya Girls' Academy. Though she expects the institution's dormitory to be full of glamor, Meiko discovers that her new home is actually a manga cafe where its residents run the business by doing community service.

Although inept with modern technology, Meiko is warmly welcomed by the other residents: Rie Amamiya, the head of the dormitory; Marika Suzuki, a popular streamer; and Neo Nakano, an aspiring professional gamer. Together, the girls navigate through school and run the manga cafe, never forgetting to enjoy every second of every day.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
Obsessed with their rather ordinary classmate Ken Kirio, high school students Aimi Miyoshi and Nami Sometani form a peculiar friendship. Every time the girls hang out, they talk about Kirio and fantasize about interacting with the boy they usually just observe from afar. Aimi and Nami are mostly satisfied with the status quo, but they occasionally cannot help but be jealous of those who get to be near their crush—though this still rarely leads them to approach him directly.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titleThai: Hokuto no Ken: Fist of the North Star
titleOriginal: Hokuto no Ken: Fist of the North Star
altTitle: 北斗の拳 -FIST OF THE NORTH STAR-
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
In 199x, the world was engulfed in the blaze of nuclear war.

With the Ocean drying up and Earth torn asunder, all life seems to be lost but humans survived stubbornly. However, what dominated the post-apocalyptic world was sheer violence. The remaining humanity was split into two groups: those who kill and take whatever they can and those who are exploited.

When all hope seems lost for the weak, a man in ragged cloth appears. He is Kenshiro, the rightful successor of the Hokuto Shinken martial arts with seven studs-like scars in the shape of the Big Dipper. His journey to becoming a legendary savior begins! 

(Source: Warner Bros. Japan, edited)

titleThai: The Regression of Great Sage Riddle
altTitle: 大賢者リドルの時間逆行
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
A young man named Riddle had lost all of his friends—and the entire world—at the hands of a mysterious organization known as the "Box of Malice." Having lost all hope to live, he dwelled in a pit of despair until he has one final revelation. What if... he could return to a time before everything ended? And so, after a thousand years, a deformed Riddle finally manages to reverse time. "I'm going to stop them this time...!" Equipped with a thousand years of knowledge and experience in his young body, the Great Sage Riddle's journey to the past now unfolds!

(Source: Shogakukan, translated)

There have been recent rumors of an apartment complex that is haunted by many lascivious women. Unaware of the hearsay, a young man named Yoshida becomes the new manager of the very complex. titleThai: Kujima: Why Sing, When You Can Warble?
altTitle: クジマ歌えば家ほろろ
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
In the autumn of his first year of middle school, Arata Kouda meets Kujima, a strange creature that sort-of looks like a bird. Since Kujima is hungry, Arata brings it home with him... But because of his older brother who failed his entrance exams, Kujima gets carried away by the situation and ends up freeloading at the Kouda residence. He says it's just until he makes it through winter, and the warmth of spring comes, but...

(Source: Shogakukan, translated)

platform: YouTube
summary:
Shizuku Kanzaki is the only son of world-renowned wine critic Yutaka Kanzaki. From a young age, Shizuku has been subjected to strange education from his father all for the sake of wine. From learning to gracefully decant a drink to intently remembering the smell of leather belts and pencils, the training causes him to grow resentful of everything related to wine. Discontent with his father, he leaves home to become an average sales representative for a beer company, refusing to ever touch wine again.

When his father suddenly passes away, Shizuku finds himself being dragged back into the world he hates so much. As part of his father's will, the one who will inherit his prized wine collection and estate will be the person who can correctly identify the "12 Apostles" of wines as well as the legendary "Drops of God." In order to inherit the assets, Shizuku has one year to complete the task, but he finds the proposition ridiculous when he is the only living relative of Yutaka.

What Yutaka failed to tell his son before his death was that he had adopted Issei Tomine into the family a week prior to his passing. Issei is a famous veteran wine critic competing against Shizuku to claim the estate for himself. With no formal training in wine tasting, Shizuku stands no chance against "The Prince of Wine" and is at risk of losing everything in this competition. Will he be able to correctly identify the elusive "Drops of God" before he runs out of time?

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

summary:
Fuu Nonoyama and Rui Nonoyama are sisters from a "land of magic," who were once on terms with one another, but have drifted apart. Suddenly, they are given magical powers by two cat-like spirits, Uguisu and Azuki, allowing them to transform into magical girl idols. However, there is a catch: these powers only last for a year and they cannot tell anyone that that magic exists. While neither Fuu nor Rui knows one another are magical girls, they soon begin their careers as idols.

altTitle: ゴーストコンサート: missing Songs
channel: Ani-One Thailand
platform: YouTube
summary:
In the year 2045, singing has been forbidden. Music is no longer created or performed by humans; instead, a music application called MiucS produces all songs on their behalf.

One day, a girl named Seria Aiba hears a human singing voice while out with her friends—something that should no longer exist. Following the sound, she encounters a mysterious presence: a ghost. What appears before her is not an ordinary spirit, but a figure from beyond this world known as a Great Ghost.

As Seria becomes drawn into encounters involving Great Ghosts, the psychic organization TERA, and a strange song known as the Possession Requiem, she finds herself stepping into a hidden side of a world that has erased human music.

This is the story of how Seria's life begins to change—and the path that leads her toward becoming a ghost herself.

(Source: MAL News)

altTitle: Komekami! Gaaruzu / こめかみっ！ Girls
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
This is the story of the seven-sister unit "Komekami! Girls," children of the rice deity, born from the tradition: "In a single grain of rice, seven gods reside."

When their mother (the deity of rice, or the rice-god queen) was called back in haste to the celestial realm and no longer able to return to the earthly realm they search for her traces using Usa City (Oita Prefecture) as their base, and teleport to Hachiman shrines throughout Kyushu island. As they solve local problems, they learn about food, take part in cooking battles, and grow.

channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย

summary:
The new anime's story centers on Konomi Inori, a first year middle school student who just moved to the town of Onegai. At the town's plaza, Konomi prayed to the goddess statue to give her a chance to be an AiPri. After she prayed, she accidentally meets the famous AiPri Aoi Yumemiya and a mysterious talking stuffed toy with her named Fortu. It turns out that Fortu is looking for an AiPri who can make their wish come true, and when Konomi opened the special mirror pact that Aoi handed her, she gets the AiPri debut that she prayed for. 

(Source: ANN)

summary:
Satoko, the eldest daughter of the honorable Kirigaya family, has received many marriage proposals from men captivated by her beauty and grace. However, she has turned them all down due to her secret heart defect. Despite her condition, Satoko is still willing to find a husband to ease her beloved father's concerns.

While on a stroll, Satoko is kidnapped by a group of mercenaries, one of them being Shinpei Gotou—a legendary assassin tasked with executing her. Satoko tries to bribe Gotou into freeing her, but it proves unsuccessful. Out of options, Satoko makes a desperate gamble: under the pretense of love at first sight, she asks him to marry her.

Unexpectedly, Gotou takes the bait and vows to protect her. As the couple escapes to freedom, Satoko struggles to keep up the ruse and make sense of the mysterious man she has eloped with.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

altTitle: Siren / PSYЯEN -サイレン-
airTimeThai: รอประกาศเวลาไทย
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Ageha Yoshina is a self-confident high school student who helps others for a fee. On his way back from a job, he finds a strange calling card with the word "Psyren" imprinted left behind in a phone booth and decides to keep it, unaware of its purpose. The very next day, Ageha discovers that his classmate Sakurako Amamiya has the exact same calling card in her possession. When he questions her, Sakurako asks him to save her, signaling the day his troubles begin.

Confused by the circumstances of this encounter, Ageha realizes something is wrong when Sakurako goes missing. In an attempt to figure out what is happening, he decides to call the number provided on the calling card and is asked a series of questions by a mysterious voice, ending with a final, cryptic question: "Would you like to go to Psyren?" Thus begins two teenagers' participation in a game of life or death within a strange world inhabited by monsters called Taboo. Granted the ability to use psychic powers known as PSI, the duo fight to return to the place they call home.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Lying on her deathbed with seemingly no chance at recovery, a young Nia Liston is soon to succumb to her illness. Unable to give up hope, her parents desperately search for a cure in even the most obscure places, leading to the appearance of a hooded man claiming he can help rid Nia of her condition. But rather than curing her, the hooded man transplants the soul of a deceased hero who was undefeated in battle into the girl's frail body.

Given a second chance at life as Nia, the hero is determined to recover her new body's strength by using a technique known as chi to target and eliminate the illness at its roots. With her enthusiastic hunger for combat having also been carried over, Nia is eager to return to exploring the world. However, the hero's restless soul yearns to find a worthy opponent who can defeat her on the battlefield, sparking chaos wherever Nia may go.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

With a decked-out ship, a crew full of babes, and a fantastic universe to explore, he's going to make the most of his good luck and create the life he's always dreamed of!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titleThai: I'm a Witch Who's Crush Requested a Love Potion
titleOriginal: Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai sareta Majo desu.
altTitle: Hello / I Am a Witch and My Crush Wants Me to Make a Love Potion! / どうも、好きな人に惚れ薬を依頼された魔女です。
airTimeThai: รอประกาศเวลาไทย
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Deep within the forest, a cozy and rather cluttered cottage sits on the lakeshore, housing a mysterious, feared witch. In truth, she is a lovely young woman named Rose, who has learned the art of potion-making from her wise grandmother. Rose cherishes her tucked-away life, yet there is a longing in her heart—for a handsome knight she once saw, Sir Harij Azm.

For four years, Rose's feelings for Harij have lingered, but she can never act on them; witches live outside of human affairs and belong to no country or man. So, when Harij suddenly appears on her doorstep looking for a love potion, Rose is both surprised and heartbroken. Although another woman has captured the noble knight's heart, Rose decides to help him. But before crafting the potion, Rose sends Harij on a series of ridiculous quests for each ingredient, hoping to delay the inevitable and savor their fleeting time together.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Koharu Satou is known to her classmates as the "unattainable flower" a cold and distant girl whose refusal to smile keeps everyone at arm's length.

However, Souta Oshio accidentally stumbles upon Satou's secret at her family's cafe. It turns out the "icy Satou-san" is actually an incredibly shy and clumsy girl who struggles even with something as simple as taking photos of sweets for the cafe's social media.

Bonding over their shared love for cameras and desserts, the distance between the two gradually shrinks. This charming romantic comedy follows two socially awkward people as they navigate their feelings in a story that is as sweet as it is endearing.

(Source: MAL News)

altTitle: Even Though I'm a Super Timid Noble Girl / I Accepted the Bet From My Cunning Fiancé / 弱気MAX令嬢なのに、辣腕婚約者様の賭けに乗ってしまった
airTimeThai: รอประกาศเวลาไทย
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
I was reborn as a villainous daughter in a reverse harem otome game.

After being sick with a high fever at the age of 10, Pia Rockwell suddenly remembered her past life as a university student in Japan. But far from going down the villainess route, all this super timid girl wants is to finally use her knowledge from when she was a grad student studying to get her doctorate in paleontology. Her ultimate goal is to become a commoner, excavate fossils, build a museum, and then become a curator.

So in order to escape the villainess route and avoid being deported by her fiancé during the graduation ball, Pia decides to avoid the upcoming hurt and heartache and asks to break off her engagement to Rufus, the Prime Minister's son.

But will her cunning fiancé let her go that easily?

(Source: MU)

channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Set in a world where 90% of humanity has contracted and died from a deadly, virulent disease, only to rise again as attacking zombies, thirteen years have passed since the "Red Day" of societal collapse. The surviving humans now live away from the big cities, still hoping to reclaim them one day. An entirely new generation, unaware of the pre-Red Day world, is coming into its own.

The story begins when Aki, who has no memories of the world before its fall, escapes her village with her close friends Haru and Natsuki to search for her missing father. As they venture into the outside world, they find themselves surrounded by zombies on all sides! Along the way, they rescue Yuu and Sakura and take refuge in a home improvement store. They regroup, and now the counterattack begins—!!

(Source: Kadokawa, edited)

summary:
Rein, an enchanter who strengthens equipment with his magic, is suddenly expelled from his guild, simply because every piece of gear in the guild has already been enhanced enough. Outraged by the absurd treatment, Rein decides to take back the enormous amount of mana he had poured into their equipment. When he casually channels it into a random copper sword, it transforms into a cheat-level weapon with 10,000 enhancement points!

With zero combat experience but armed with magic that can turn anything into overpowered gear, this enchanter sets off to enjoy a new, carefree life as an adventurer!

(Source: Shochiku)

altTitle: ジャンケットバンク
airTimeThai: รอประกาศเวลาไทย
channel: ยังไม่ประกาศช่องทางไทย
platform: ยังไม่ประกาศ
summary:
Karasu Bank is one of Japan's leading banks, boasting the third-highest operating profits in the country. Akira Mitarai is a young employee in his second year at the bank's central branch. His exceptional math skills allow him to instantly spot accounting errors but also make his day-to-day life incredibly boring.

One day, Akira is suddenly transferred to the Special Operations Department's "Appraisal Unit," which he is told is a key department within the bank. Suspicious of his transfer and the unfamiliar department, he is told by his new boss that the bank actually operates a massive underground casino, and that the Appraisal Unit is the department responsible for managing this gambling as well as the gamblers who participate in it. But these gamblers are putting more than just their money on the line, with their very lives serving as collateral to play! Higher risk means higher rewards, but at the top level losing is a death sentence.

Overwhelmed and confused by the strange state of the bank's secret casino, Mitarai meets a mysterious, genius gambler, Shin Mafutsu. Enraptured by Shin's ability to see through his opponents' cheating and emerge victorious, Akira decides to enter the world of life-or-death gambling as Shin's bank representative.

(Source: MAL News)

summary:
Twenty years have passed since the combining robot Dandivine defeated the mysterious invaders known as the Aposdoll. With the threat gone, the world has enjoyed a long era of peace. But for toy manufacturer Casga, whose fortunes were built on the popularity of Dandivine merchandise, that peace has come at a cost. Having relied too heavily on the legendary robot's fame, the company has steadily fallen into decline.

Desperate to revive both Dandivine and his struggling business, Casga's president, Genjurou Shijima, dreams of the robot's return—even if it means disrupting the peace. Then, as if in answer to his wish, the Aposdolls suddenly reappear in Tokyo.

As panic spreads among a population that has known nothing but peace for two decades, high school student Gekiha Shijima is recruited by his uncle, Yuusaku Kuroiwa, the former main pilot of Dandivine. Drawn into the cockpit of the legendary machine, Gekiha finds himself at the center of a new battle.

Why have the Aposdolls returned after all these years? And can Dandivine rise once again to face the threat? A new chapter in the fight for humanity is about to begin.

(Source: MAL News)

Then Noa, a minor goddess, appears before him. After she pleads and begs him, he decides to become her first believer. The weakest boy in the class becomes the strongest alongside the minor goddess in this another world fantasy!
